_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: irradiated Nf1+/− mutant mice were more likely than irradiated WT mice to develop hematologic malignancies (p=0.003, log-rank test) or solid cancers (p=0.05)
details: More likely than WT mice to develop hematologic malignancies (p=0.003, log-rank test) or solid cancers (p=0.05) after irradiation
